free_text: Yields of Te-121m, Te-121g and Te-123m in the
bombardment of antimony by protons and deuterons
English translation
Quantum yield X-rays of Te-121m, Te-121g and
Te-123m was calculated.
By P.P.Dmitriev.
Information about monitor reactions was received
from the authors.
- Method of the
quantum yields calculation
Results of the
present paper are compared with results of Macoroa
et al.
Errors are due mainly to systematic errors
in measuring the activities of the radionuclides
and the integrated flux of bombarding particles.
BIB section was updated, correction was
made according to new EXFOR rules.
SD: REACTION code was updated according to
MEMO CP-D/933rev. in Subents 002-004. RAD-DET deleted.
SD: Corrections in all Subents. Several
Subents were split according to EXFOR rules.
